content:
Uranus in Cancer: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Uranus in Cancer blends the archetypal drive of Uranus (where you seek change, break rules, and awaken) with the Water, cardinal nature of Cancer.

  • Planet: Uranus — change, innovation, rebellion, awakening, freedom
  • Sign: Cancer (Water/Cardinal) — emotion, nurturing, home, protection, memory

Eastern Perspective
